mapper.insert: insert into jmeter_runip_states (id, ipaddress, states, `type`, `time`, runusername, runstate) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ipaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{states,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runstate,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into jmeter_runip_states
id,
ipaddress,
states,
`type`,
`time`,
runusername,
runstate,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{ipaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{states,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{runusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update jmeter_runip_states
ipaddress = #{ipaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
states = #{states,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`time` = #{time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
runusername = #{runusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
runstate = #{runstate,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update jmeter_runip_states set ipaddress = #{ipaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, states = #{states,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `time` = #{time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, runusername = #{runusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, runstate = #{runstate,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select DISTINCT ipaddress, states, type,`time`,runusername,runstate from jmeter_runip_states where states in
#{item}
